assertions.title: Curve initializes all chains at startup

steps.action: Stop existing dev server on port 3002
Start dev server with PORT=3002 npm run dev and capture startup logs
steps.expected: Startup logs show Curve initialization for all 7 supported chains (1, 8453, 42161, 10, 137, 56, 43114)
steps.observed: Logs show: 'Initializing Curve API for all supported chains...' followed by CURVE-JS IS CONNECTED TO NETWORK for all 7 chains (MAINNET/1, BASE/8453, ARBITRUM/42161, OPTIMISM/10, MATIC/137, BNB/56, UNKNOWN/43114), then 'Curve initialized for chain X' for each chain, then 'Curve API initialization complete'

steps.action: Verify all 7 chains reported successful initialization
steps.expected: Log lines: 'Curve initialized for chain 1', 'Curve initialized for chain 8453', 'Curve initialized for chain 42161', 'Curve initialized for chain 10', 'Curve initialized for chain 137', 'Curve initialized for chain 56', 'Curve initialized for chain 43114'
steps.observed: All 7 'Curve initialized for chain X' log lines present. No ERROR lines. All chains initialized in parallel via Promise.allSettled.

steps.action: Verify server starts successfully after Curve init
steps.expected: Server listening message and /health returns ok
steps.observed: 'Server listening on http://0.0.0.0:3002' logged. curl /health returned {"status":"ok"}

assertions.title: Curve init failure on one chain doesn't block others

steps.action: Stop dev server and restart with RPC_URL_8453=https://invalid-rpc-url-for-testing.example.com PORT=3002
steps.expected: Server starts; chain 8453 (Base) fails to initialize; other 6 chains succeed
steps.observed: Server started. Logs show ERROR: 'Curve failed to initialize for chain 8453: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND invalid-rpc-url-for-testing.example.com'. All other 6 chains (1, 42161, 10, 137, 56, 43114) show 'Curve initialized for chain X'. Server reached 'Curve API initialization complete' and 'Server listening'.

steps.action: Query /compare on Ethereum (chain 1) — an unaffected chain
steps.expected: Curve quote returned successfully with non-zero output
steps.observed: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48&to=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2&amount=1000&slippageBps=50 returned Curve quote with output_amount=0.505007540913830596. curve_error: None.

steps.action: Query /compare on Base (chain 8453) — the failed chain
steps.expected: curve_error indicates initialization failure for chain 8453
steps.observed: GET /compare?chainId=8453&from=0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913&to=0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006&amount=100&slippageBps=50 returned curve_error: 'Curve initialization failed for chain 8453: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND invalid-rpc-url-for-testing.example.com'. No crash, other data intact.

steps.action: Restore normal dev server (no bad RPC override) on port 3002
steps.expected: Server restarts normally with all 7 chains initialized
steps.observed: Server restarted with PORT=3002 npm run dev. curl /health returned {"status":"ok"}.

evidence.network:
GET /compare?chainId=1... -> 200 (Curve quote with output_amount=0.505007540913830596)
GET /compare?chainId=8453... -> 200 (curve_error: 'Curve initialization failed for chain 8453: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND invalid-rpc-url-for-testing.example.com')
GET /health -> 200 (after normal restart)

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CURVE-010: All 7 Curve chains (1, 8453, 42161, 10, 137, 56, 43114) initialize in parallel at startup with success logs for each. VAL-CURVE-011: With an intentionally bad RPC for chain 8453, that chain fails gracefully (logged ERROR, reports init failure in API response) while all other 6 chains initialize successfully and return valid Curve quotes.
